name: Lightwave Logic, Inc.
summary: Lightwave Logic, Inc. is a specialty materials and intellectual property company focused on developing and commercializing proprietary electro-optic (EO) polymer materials, specifically its Perkinamine family, designed for high-speed optical modulators in data communications and photonic applications. The company targets silicon photonics and photonic integrated circuit platforms, pursuing revenue through material sales, IP licensing, and royalty arrangements with semiconductor foundries, optical module manufacturers, and system integrators serving AI, cloud computing, data center, and telecom markets.
